description:
A comprehensive dataset analyzing employee attrition, demographics, job roles, performance ratings, and work-life balance factors.

HR Analytics, Employee Attrition, Workforce Management, Employee Performance, Business Travel, Work-Life Balance, Job Satisfaction, Employee Retention, Human Resources, Organizational Behavior
